SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement ("Agreement") is made on this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: tanwm@example.sg.

2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, a representative of Puncak Ventures Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432H), located at 456 Raffles Place, #23-01, Singapore 048123, contact number: +65 9876 5432, email: aishah@puncakventures.sg.

Whereas, Dr. Tan Wei Ming agrees to sell, and Puncak Ventures Pte. Ltd. agrees to purchase 1,000,000 shares of Tan Tech Innovations Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 2,500,000. 

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
